center.name: 瓦恰馬卡里峰
center.summary: 瓦恰馬卡里峰是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Great elaenia，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: tyleri is found in Venezuela on cerros Parú, Huachamacari, Marahuaca, and Duida in Amazonas state and on Meseta del Cerro Jaua in Bolívar state

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: tyleri is found in Venezuela on cerros Parú, Huachamacari, Marahuaca, and Duida in Amazonas state and on Meseta del Cerro Jaua in Bolívar state
